name: Letena, Sister of Battle (Imperial Guard POV)
description:
The stress of seeing so many brave men and women of the Guard has taken it's toll on the honorable Sororita Letena. It seems her method of coping is to make nice with one of those brave souls sure to soon perish in another pointless charge.

I used the same general code as I did for my previous Sororita, Ionerina, but gave this one a separate personality, appearance, armor, scenario and intro message, along with some artwork generated by yours truly. Hope y'all enjoy!
creator: Cha;amagne
